parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 蓝牙配对-搜索流程

participant "调用" as Caller
box "sdk_client" #E8E8E8
participant IotRecorderManager
participant DevicesManagerMachine
participant BlueDiscoveryControl
participant BlueBondControl
participant BleScanControl
participant BluetoothGattConfig
participant WifiManagerMachine
participant BluetoothPanConfig
participant WifiPortalControl
end box
participant BluetoothAdapter
participant BluetoothDevice
participant BluetoothGatt
participant WifiList

note over DevicesManagerMachine: InitState
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: InitState.enter
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueBondControl: registerReceiver

== 搜索设备 ==
Caller -> IotRecorderManager: startDiscoveryDevice
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: startDiscoveryDevice
note over DevicesManagerMachine: InitState --> DiscoveryState
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: CMD_DISCOVERY_START
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: DiscoveryState.enter
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueDiscoveryControl: registerReceiver
BlueDiscoveryControl --> DevicesManagerMachine: new DiscoveryBroadcastReceiver
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothAdapter: startDiscovery
BluetoothAdapter --> BlueDiscoveryControl: startDiscovery
note over BlueDiscoveryControl: BluetoothDevice.ACTION_FOUND
BlueDiscoveryControl --> DevicesManagerMachine: DiscoveryBroadcastReceiver
note over DevicesManagerMachine: MSG_DISCOVERY_FOUND
DevicesManagerMachine -> IotRecorderManager: sendMessage
IotRecorderManager --> Caller: MSG_DISCOVERY_FOUND\n返回搜索到的蓝牙设备信息: BluetoothDevice

== 绑定设备 ==
Caller -> IotRecorderManager: BondDevice
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: BondDevice
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: CMD_BOND_DEVICE
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothAdapter: cancelDiscovery
BluetoothAdapter --> BlueBondControl: cancelDiscovery
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothDevice: bondDevice
BluetoothDevice --> BlueBondControl: createBond
BlueBondControl --> DevicesManagerMachine: BondBroadcastReceiver
note over DevicesManagerMachine: DiscoveryState --> BondedState
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: MSG_BOND_SUCCESS
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: BondedState.enter
DevicesManagerMachine --> Caller: MSG_BOND_SUCCESS\n返回绑定设备成功

== 建立GATT连接 ==
Caller -> IotRecorderManager: connectGatt
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: connectGatt
note over DevicesManagerMachine: BondedState --> BleScanState
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: CMD_CONNECT_GATT
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: BleScanState.enter
DevicesManagerMachine -> BleScanControl: StartLeScan
BleScanControl -> BluetoothAdapter: getBluetoothLeScanner().startScan
BluetoothAdapter --> BleScanControl: ScanCallback.onScanResult
BleScanControl -> BluetoothAdapter: getBluetoothLeScanner().stopScan
BleScanControl --> DevicesManagerMachine: MSG_LESCAN_RESULT
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothGattConfig: connect
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothDevice: connectGatt
BluetoothDevice --> BluetoothGattConfig: BluetoothGattCallback.onConnectionStateChange
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGatt: discoverServices 发现远程设备提供的服务，以及它们包含的特征特性和描述符
BluetoothGatt --> BluetoothGattConfig: onServicesDiscovered
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGatt: setCharacteristicNotification 拿到需要的服务和特征
BluetoothGattConfig --> DevicesManagerMachine: MSG_GATT_GETSERVICE_SUCCEED
DevicesManagerMachine --> Caller: MSG_GATT_GETSERVICE_SUCCEED
note over DevicesManagerMachine: BleScanState --> GattConnectedState
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine: GattConnectedState.enter
DevicesManagerMachine --> Caller: MSG_GATT_CONNECTED
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine: new
WifiManagerMachine -> BluetoothPanConfig: new
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiPortalControl: new
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine: start
note over WifiManagerMachine: IdleState --> WifiConfigState
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine: CMD_START

== 同步wifi状态 ==
Caller -> IotRecorderManager: syncWifiState
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: syncWifiState
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine: CMD_SYNC_WIFI_STATE
WifiManagerMachine -> BluetoothGattConfig: syncWifiState
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig: setCharacteristic CMD_GET_WIFI_STATE
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGatt: writeCharacteristic 向服务端传递数据
BluetoothGatt --> BluetoothGattConfig: onCharacteristicChanged _UUID_WIFI_STATE_WIFIConfig.isEnable setWifiState("ON")
note left of BluetoothGattConfig
message.what = DevicesManagerMachine.MSG_WIFI_STATE;
message.arg1 = WifiManagerMachine.WIFI_STATE;
message.arg2 = WifiManagerMachine.MSG_WIFI_ON;
message.obj = new String(characteristic.getValue());
end note
BluetoothGattConfig --> DevicesManagerMachine: processMessage
note left of DevicesManagerMachine
message.what = msg.arg1;
message.arg1 = msg.arg2;
message.obj = msg.obj;
end note
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine: processMessage
note right of WifiManagerMachine
message.what = IotRecorderManager.WIFI_STATE;
message.obj = msg.obj;
message.arg1 = IotRecorderManager.WIFI_STATE_ON;
mClientHandler.sendMessage(message);
end note
WifiManagerMachine --> Caller: WifiConfigState.processMessage

== 打开wifi开关 ==
Caller -> IotRecorderManager: setWifiState
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: setWifiState
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine: CMD_ENABLE_WIFI
WifiManagerMachine -> BluetoothGattConfig: SetWifiState
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig: setCharacteristic CMD_ENABLE_WIFI
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGatt: writeCharacteristic 向服务端传递数据

== wifiScan ==
Caller -> IotRecorderManager: wifiScan
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: wifiScan
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine: CMD_SCAN_WIFI_LIST
WifiManagerMachine -> BluetoothGattConfig: setUuidRequestScan
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig: setCharacteristic CMD_GET_SCAN_WIFILIST
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGatt: writeCharacteristic 向服务端传递数据
BluetoothGatt --> BluetoothGattConfig: _UUID_WIFI_ACCESSPOINT <- sendwifiList <- SCAN_RESULTS_AVAILABLE_ACTION
BluetoothGattConfig -> WifiList: updateAccessPoints

@enduml
```
